zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester於大約1291年出生時，他的父親Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley25歲，母親Isolde de Mortimer30歲。他於1317年4月28日與Margaret de Clare在英國波克夏溫莎女爵結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1317年在英國盧特藍德被列為sheriff of rutland 。他去世於1347年11月10日在英國肯特托布利其享年57歲，埋葬在英國肯特托布利其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester于大约1291年出生时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley25岁，母亲Isolde de Mortimer30岁。他于1317年4月28日与Margaret de Clare在英国波克夏溫莎女爵结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他于1317年在英国盧特藍德被列为sheriff of rutland 。他去世于1347年11月10日在英国肯特托布利其享年57岁，埋葬在英国肯特托布利其。

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester was born about 1291, his father, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, was 25 and his mother, Isolde de Mortimer, was 30. He married Margaret de Clare on 28 April 1317, in Windsor, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1317, his occupation is listed as sheriff of rutland  in Rutland, England. He died on 10 November 1347, in Tonbridge, Kent, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Tonbridge, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester est né environ 1291, son père, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isolde de Mortimer, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Clare le 28 avril 1317, à Windsor, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1317, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of rutland  à Rutland, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1347, à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Tonbridge, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester um 1291 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley 25 und seine Mutter Isolde de Mortimer 30. Er hat am 28. April 1317 in Windsor, Berkshire, England Margaret de Clare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1317 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of rutland  in Rutland, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. November 1347 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Tonbridge, Kent, England und wurde in Tonbridge, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester è nato il circa 1291, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isolde de Mortimer, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Clare il 28 aprile 1317, nel Windsor, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1317, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of rutland  nel Rutland, England. Morì il 10 novembre 1347, nel Tonbridge, Kent, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Tonbridge, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucesterが約1291年に生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audleyは25歳，母Isolde de Mortimerは30歳であった。1317年4月28日にイギリスバークシュアイアウィンドソルでMargaret de Clareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1317年，イギリスルトランドでの職業はsheriff of rutland と記録されている。彼は1347年11月10日にイギリスケントトンブリッジで57歳で死去し，イギリスケントトンブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester(이)가 대략 1291년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolde de Mortimer(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1317년 4월 28일 영국 버크실르 윈드소르에서 Margaret de Clare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1317년, 그의 직업은 영국 루틀랜드에서 sheriff of rutland 이었다. 그는 1347년 11월 10일 영국 켄트 토브리지에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 토브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester nasceu aproximadamente 1291, seu pai, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isolde de Mortimer, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Clare em 28 de abril de 1317, em Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1317, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of rutland  em Rutland, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1347, em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, England: Stratton Audley, Oxfordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester родился около 1291 г., его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolde de Mortimer, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Clare 28 апреля 1317 г. в местности виндзор, биркшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1317 году он работал по профессии sheriff of rutland  в местности рутланд, Англия. Он умер 10 ноября 1347 г. в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности тонбридж, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Audley 1st Earl of Gloucester nació aproximadamente 1291, su papá, Sir Hugh Audley of Sratton Audley, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isolde de Mortimer, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margaret de Clare el 28 de abril de 1317, en Windsor, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1317, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of rutland  en Rutland, Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1347, en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Tonbridge, Kent, Inglaterra.
